title: BDRY - May 23, 2023
summary: Freight futures contango evaporates as optimism turns into caution - Not much has changed in the spot market Chinese data remains stagnant while Beijing is reluctant to add more liquidity - Chinese economic data is running Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
